rulings.Case Title: SHARON CHIU et al VS. ANTHONY L. HEAD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Deft Collectronics, Inc. For Award Of Attorneys' Fees Under Ccp 425.16(C);
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MARCH 23, 2007, LINE 3. DEFENDANT COLLECTRONICS, INC.'S Motion For Award Of Attorneys' Fees Under C.c.p. 425.16(C) IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $39,435.00. THE MOTION IS TIMELY UNDER C.R.C. SECTION 3.1702(B). THE HOURLY RATE OF $275 BASED ON THE PRIOR AWARD IN THIS CASE. DEFENDANTS WERE NOT REQUIRED TO FILE A JOINT MOTION. FLATT AND HOOPER FEES ARE STRICKEN FOR LACK OF SUPPORT. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: RUTH YAGER VS. AGCO CORPORATION,INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR IN et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MARCH 23, 2007, LINE 4. DEFENDANT CLEAVER-BROOKS, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED, FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF. THE FACT THAT DEFENDANT HAS NOT MANUFACTURED BOILERS SUITABLE FOR NAVY VESSELS DOES NOT MEAN THE BOILERS WERE NOT ON THE SHIPS AND THERE IS A DISPUTE OF FACT GIVEN, PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY. CONSORTIUM CLAIM IS MOOT. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: RUTH YAGER VS. AGCO CORPORATION,INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR IN et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MARCH 23, 2007, LINE 4. DEFENDANT WARREN PUMPS, L.L.C.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED, FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN. INTERROGATORY FOUR DOES NOT REQUEST PLAINTIFF TO IDENTIFY ALL WITNESSES AND DOCUMENTS THAT CAN SUPPORT THE CLAIM. CLAIM IS NOT BARRED BY GOVERNMENT CONTRACTOR. DEFENDANT HAS NOT ESTABLISHED ELEMENTS TWO AND THREE OF THE IMMUNITY. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT ALSO EXISTS BASED ON THE BURGER DECLARATION. THE STATE OF WASHINGTON CASES ARE SOUNDLY DECIDED AND CONSISTENT WITH CALIFORNIA LAW, WRIGHT V STANG MFG. 54 CAL APP 4TH 1218. OBJECTION TO MANUALS OVERRULED. =(302/PJM/AP)
